mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_member (member_id, chatroom_id, chat_member_role, chat_member_status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{chatroomId}, #{chatMemberRole}, #{chatMemberStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT chatroom_id FROM chat_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND chat_member_status = '참여중' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_member WHERE chatroom_id = #{chatroomId} AND chat_member_status = '참여중'

SELECT cm.chat_member_id AS chatMemberId, cm.member_id AS memberId, cm.chatroom_id AS chatroomId, cm.chat_member_role AS chatMemberRole, cm.chat_member_status AS chatMemberStatus, m.member_name AS memberName FROM chat_member cm JOIN member m ON cm.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cm.chatroom_id = #{chatroomId} AND cm.chat_member_status = '참여중' ORDER BY CASE WHEN cm.chat_member_role = '방장' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.member_name ASC
